title: Add CI matrix to build and publish Rust CLI binaries
description: Create GitHub Actions workflow to build Rust CLI binaries for major targets (linux x86_64, macOS arm64/x86_64, windows x86_64). Attach artifacts to releases or publish as workflow artifacts. Ensure release pipeline includes Rust binaries alongside PyPI release.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added release workflow job to build and upload Rust CLI binaries for linux, macOS (x86_64/arm64), and windows. Uses semantic-release tag to attach assets to GitHub release once PyPI publish succeeds.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Pushed release workflow updates and footer change. Waiting for CI/release runs to confirm binaries attach correctly; will close once verified.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed Windows build failure by gating daemon Unix socket code behind cfg(unix) and returning a clear 'daemon not supported on this platform' error on non-unix targets.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Refined daemon unix gating: split send_request/spawn_daemon and run_daemon into cfg(unix)/cfg(not(unix)) implementations so Windows builds skip UnixStream references.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions builds Rust CLI binaries for linux x86_64, macOS arm64/x86_64, windows x86_64. Artifacts are attached to releases or uploaded as workflow artifacts for each release. Workflow documented and wired into release pipeline.
